description: The Parrello 'ndrina is a mafia clan based in Palmi, Reggio Calabria, Italy. It is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and infiltration of public contracts. The clan has been engaged in feuds with rival 'ndrine such as the Gallico. Recent operations have led to arrests for international drug trafficking and corruption.

country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Parrello made real estate investments in Brazil.

country_links.evidence_quote: investimenti immobiliari in Francia ( Costa Azzurra )
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Parrello made real estate investments in France (Côte d'Azur).

country_links.evidence_quote: investimenti immobiliari in ... Spagna ( Isole Canarie )
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Parrello made real estate investments in Spain (Canary Islands).
